message:
ci(installer): skip ubuntu upgrade in CI containers

CI containers cannot reboot during workflow execution, so skip the
Ubuntu upgrade step that requires reboots.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -115,7 +115,8 @@ jobs:
       - name: Run installer
         run: |
           # Skip preflight in CI - GitHub Actions containers have limited disk (17GB < 20GB required)
-          bash install.sh --yes --skip-preflight --mode ${{ matrix.mode }}
+          # Skip Ubuntu upgrade in CI - containers can't reboot during workflow
+          bash install.sh --yes --skip-preflight --skip-ubuntu-upgrade --mode ${{ matrix.mode }}
 
       - name: Run doctor
         run: |
